title: Part-Time Partnerships and Events Manager
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Partnerships & Events Manager

Company: Sainhall Nutrihealth

Location: Jalan Pemimpin, Singapore

Job Type: Part-Time, Hybrid (Approximately 40 to 45 hours per month)

Salary: S$1,500 - $2,500, depending on experience and commitment levels

Work Visa Requirements: Singaporeans and PRs only. We do not have any foreign quota.

About Us

Sainhall Nutrihealth is a Singapore-headquartered health and nutrition SME with over 30 years of industry experience. Backed by a regional presence and bold innovation, we are behind some of Singapore’s most promising up-and-coming wellness brands including DeeFruit, our healthy fruit snack. Identified as a high-potential growth enterprise by the Singapore government, we’re building the next generation of household brands from Singapore to the world. We move fast, make decisions quickly and offer early-career talent meaningful exposure and ownership.

The Role: A Flexible, High-Impact Opportunity

We are seeking an experienced Part-Time Partnerships & Events Manager to take the lead in planning, coordinating, and executing our offline marketing initiatives. This role is perfect for a seasoned marketing or events professional, ideally a parent partially returning to the workforce or anyone looking for a flexible yet significant position to supplement their income.

You will be the key driver of our roadshows and partnership activations, overseeing a small team of two staff remotely and reporting directly to the Commercial Director. This is an autonomous role where your expertise will directly contribute to our brand’s’ growth.

Key Responsibilities:

Partnerships & Vendor Liaison:

  • Identify, build, and maintain strong relationships with partners, mall management and event organisers etc.
  • Liaise and negotiate with vendors for supplies, sampling materials, and other logistical needs.
  • Proactively source new partnership opportunities to expand our brand reach and drive customer acquisition.

Roadshow & Event Management:

  • Spearhead the end-to-end planning and execution of mainly weekend roadshows, pop-ups and sampling events from our office.
  • Take charge on-site during events to manage manpower, ensure smooth operations, troubleshoot any issues, and to ensure a premium brand experience for all attendees.
  • Coordinate logistics, including booth setup, inventory management and post-event tear-down.

Who We're Looking For:

  • Experienced Professional: You have at least 5 years of proven experience in marketing, with a strong focus on events management, roadshows, or field marketing.
  • A Natural Leader: You have prior experience managing or supervising a small team. You're confident giving direction and adaptable.
  • An Excellent Communicator: You are skilled at liaising with external partners and internal teams who include remote workers from different cultures.
  • A Proactive Problem-Solver: You are highly organised, resourceful, and can think on your feet in a fast-paced event environment.
  • Independent & Accountable: You are a self-starter who can manage your own time effectively to meet deadlines and objectives with minimal supervision.
  • Flexibility is Key: You must be available to work on weekends when roadshows are scheduled (around twice a month)
  • Own Transport: Having your own vehicle would be preferable.

Why This is a Great Opportunity:

  • Stable & Flexible Schedule: Enjoy a predictable part-time schedule (approx. 10 hours/week), blending planning with on-site event execution. Perfect for maintaining a healthy work-life balance.
  • Ownership & Impact: This is not just a support role. You will own the event strategy and see the direct results of your efforts.
  • Ideal for Experienced Talent: We value experience and this role is perfect for someone who wants to apply their skills in a meaningful, part-time capacity

Work Arrangement:

  • Commitment: 40 to 45 hours per month.
  • Schedule: This is a hybrid role. Depending on work requirements, you may be required to fulfil some hours from our office. This will be combined with on-site management during weekend events.

postedCompany.description:
We are a market leading distributor for health and nutritional products in South East Asia. We distribute premium brands health and nutritional products from U.S.A. , representing Cyanotech Inc. of U.S.A., supplying health supplements, spirulina and natural astaxanthin to the region.


We have an inclusive culture, fostering a positive company culture with values that every employee knows by heart. These values and mission are accessible and branded into everyone part of the business. Not just colleagues, but friends. A great work environment is a breeding ground for genuine relationship. With business expansion, comes the opportunity of having the right fit to build a great team.
